title: Phyto Care Card
description: Auto-generate printable PDF care sheets per product, attached to order confirmation emails.

title: Phyto Climate Zone
description: Maps products to 15 PCC-IN climate zones via offline pincode lookup. Covers 797 India PIN prefixes.

title: Phyto Plant Collection Widget
description: Allow customers to track and manage their plant collection from purchased orders.

title: Phyto Grex Registry
description: Attach structured scientific and horticultural taxonomy metadata to any product.

title: Phyto Growth Stages
description: Replace or augment combination size labels with named growth stages, each carrying care-difficulty and time-to-maturity metadata.

title: Phyto Live Arrival Guarantee
description: Live Arrival Guarantee opt-in at checkout with configurable shipping windows, fee management, and claim forms.

title: Phyto Seasonal Availability
description: Mark products with dormancy/shipping windows, block purchase during incompatible months, and show a notify-me form when out of season.

title: Phyto Source Badge
description: Display sourcing origin badges on product cards and pages.

title: Phyto Subscription
description: Recurring mystery box and replenishment subscriptions via Cashfree.

title: Phyto Wholesale Portal
description: B2B wholesale tier with MOQ, tiered pricing and invoice payment.

title: PhytoCommerce Pack
description: 1-click installer for the complete PhytoCommerce module suite — 21 modules for specialty plant e-commerce.

title: Phyto ERP Connector
description: Connects PrestaShop stores to ERPNext v15 — syncs orders, customers, products and invoices

title: Phyto Quick Add
description: Quickly add products and categories with taxonomy intelligence

title: Phyto SEO Booster
description: AI-powered SEO automation for plant listings — auto meta, schema markup, alt text, and bulk audit
